functions.label: buildDocumentStructureOverviewForPipelinePrompt
description:
Builds a JSON-serializable overview of sample document structure (fields, example values, schema hints)
for the pipeline suggestion prompt—no ingest simulation or parse-rate semantics.
signature: , isOtel: boolean, mappedFields: Record<string, string>) => Promise<{ document_count: number; fields: string[]; }>

functions.label: buildSimulationFeedback

Builds a structured simulation feedback object used by both the initial dataset
analysis and the `simulate_pipeline` tool callback. Returns a consistent shape:
`{ valid, errors, metrics, processors, temporary_fields }`.

functions.label: fetchMappedFieldsForStreamProcessingSuggestions
description: Field types from the stream index (field_caps); reused for prompt overview + simulate tool metrics.

functions.label: formatUpstreamSeedParsingContextForPromptMarkdown
description:
Human-readable block for the suggestion prompt: describes the system-managed grok/dissect
that already ran so samples match that shape. Not a processor the agent should recreate.

functions.label: formatZodPipelineErrors
description:
Narrows Zod union validation errors to only the issues relevant to each step's
intended `action` type. Without this, a union of 6 processor schemas produces
errors for all 6 variants even when only one is relevant — flooding the LLM
with noise.

When `allowedActions` is provided, steps whose action is not in the set are
reported as disallowed rather than validated against the full schema.
signature: <unknown>, input: unknown, allowedActions: Set<string> | undefined) => { stepIndex: number; action: string; message: string; }[]

functions.label: mergeSeedParsingProcessorIntoSuggestedPipeline
description:
Prepends a server-selected grok/dissect processor to the agent's suggested pipeline and
re-assigns step identifiers. Use at the orchestration layer only — `suggestProcessingPipeline`
does not receive the seed parser.

functions.label: suggestProcessingPipeline

Runs the ingest-pipeline suggestion agent. Callers supply the Zod schema that constrains tool
arguments (full vs post-parse-only), sample `documents` that match that mode, and a
pre-built **`initialDatasetAnalysisJson`** (document structure overview for the samples in `documents`);
any seed grok/dissect step is composed **outside** this function.

children.label: initialDatasetAnalysisJson
description: Pre-computed JSON for `initial_dataset_analysis` (field layout / sample values for `documents`).

children.label: mappedFields
description: Mapped fields from field_caps; callers must fetch before calling.

children.label: upstreamSeedParsingContextMarkdown
description:
When the caller runs an upstream grok/dissect seed step, pass a formatted description so the model
knows parsing already happened. Omit or leave empty when the full processor schema is used.

signature: (feature: { id: string; stream_name: string; type: string; description: string; properties: Record<string, unknown>; confidence: number; subtype?: string | undefined; title?: string | undefined; evidence?: string[] | undefined; evidence_doc_ids?: string[] | undefined; tags?: string[] | undefined; filter?:

children.label: stream_names
description: Optional: if omitted, search across all accessible streams.

children.label: search_text
description: Optional: free-text search (best-effort across stored fields).

children.label: kind
description:
What to return.
- ['query'] enables "queries-only KIs".
- default is empty array (or omitted), which returns everything.

children.label: metrics
signature: { sampled: number; fields: string[]; parse_rate: number; }

misc.label: IgnoredFeature
signature: { feature_id: string; feature_title: string; excluded_feature_id: string; reason: string; }

misc.label: SuggestPipelineAgentSchema
description: Zod schema passed to `suggestProcessingPipeline` to constrain tool calls; chosen by the caller.

objects.label: postParsePipelineDefinitionSchema
description:
When a system-managed grok/dissect step runs first, the agent only proposes
post-parse processors; grok/dissect are excluded to avoid duplicate parsing.
